_note: SD1.5 (light, fp32 on MPS). Prompts are subject-first — CLIP truncates at 77 tokens, so keep style_anchor short and the subject leading.
style_anchor: Warcraft-3 Hearthstone hand-painted cartoon, steampunk dwarven, thick clean outlines, brass copper and teal glow on dark stone, single centered game token, plain grey background, no text
negative: text, letters, words, caption, watermark, signature, ui, hud, frame, border, multiple subjects, duplicate, collage, photo, photorealistic, 3d render, cgi, blurry, lowres, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, deformed, mutated
